posts.author: ashtondavanzo (ashton@adrenalinattractions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Quotes currently support only a single quote number with no revision tracking. Add revision identifiers (R1, R2, etc.) to clearly track changes over time.

What are you trying to achieve

Clearly track quote revisions and ensure clients and internal teams know which version is approved.
